user_task_description: This deck needs a coherent theme, consistent typography, and aligned workstream cards.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Apply a unified navy professional theme across the deck, make slide titles and card/body text stylistically consistent, and align the three workstream cards on Slide 2 onto one even horizontal line with equal spacing.
atomic_scope: Only the deck-wide theming, style consistency, and Slide 2 card alignment are explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .pptx deck with coherent theme, consistent styling, and corrected card alignment.

notes.Latent Issues Intentionally Left In The:
- Storyline issues may remain
- Do not reorder slides
